meta.description: 形象风格锁定 - 确保所有生成的图像风格一致

style_lock.reason: 初始形象是真人照片，所有后续图像必须保持真人风格

realistic_human.name: 真人/写实风格
realistic_human.prompt_suffix: , realistic photo style, real person, photorealistic, not anime, not 2D, not cartoon
realistic_human.description: 真实人类照片风格，适合真人参考图

anime_2d.name: 二次元/动漫风格
anime_2d.description: 二次元动漫风格，适合动漫角色参考图

rules.implementation: 自动添加 negative_keywords 到 negative_prompt
如果风格不符合，重新生成或标记警告

example.original: A woman wearing a JK uniform, smiling
example.style_suffix: , realistic photo style, real person, photorealistic, not anime, not 2D, not cartoon
example.final: A woman wearing a JK uniform, smiling, realistic photo style, real person, photorealistic, not anime, not 2D, not cartoon

realistic_human.negative: anime, 2D, cartoon, illustration, anime style, manga, 二次元, drawing, sketch, painting, digital art

actions: 如果仍不符合，使用参考图+换装方式

user_instruction.message: 窝窝的初始形象是真人风格，所有后续照片都会保持真人风格。如果生成的照片不符合预期，请告诉我，我会调整。
